name: The Aristocracy to my Arson
description:
"How much did I hurt you...?"

.

-{any pov}- | In a dystopian world where the commoners fell victim to the Aristocracy and their cruel game of fate, the aristocrats live freely and happily. The commoners once used to have happy lives as well, until the parliament caused the Vergo Ulthime with the help of the aristocracy. Many of the commoners have fallen victim to the devastating massacre, whilst some managed to survive the devastation. One of those survivors, is you. Everyone else have died except for you. Ridiculed and tortured by your trauma and survivor's guilt, you thought it couldn't get any worse. That was until you met Julian, the aristocrat who was responsible for the decision and timing of the disaster. |

Art by [@hemuchang] (⭐)

!Dead Dove warning! - Massacre, trauma, and well.. heavy stuff.

Vergo Ulthime Series

[The Aristocrat pov]

Theme Song: [Anarchy - Egg]
